The Sanford Redesign

{/* Left Column: Sticky Context */}

Seamless integration.
Flawless execution.

A complete structural gut and floor plan redesign. We removed load-bearing walls to achieve an open-concept flow, anchored by custom millimeter-tight millwork and a continuous-vein stone island. Handled with high-rise scheduling discipline from demo to final inspection.

Scope
Full Interior Gut
Timeline
14 Weeks
Location
Springwater, ON
